text.title: Impl Plan Task Format Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Impl Plan Task Format.

example.scenario: A solo engineer creates TASK_023-rotate-stripe-webhook-secret.md: front-matter id=23, est_tokens=18000, status=todo, depends_on=[22], component=apps/payments/webhooks.py, owner=@ruslan; body lists 4 steps and 3 binary acceptance checks.
example.trace: r1-front-matter-required → r3-kebab-case-slug → r5-acceptance-testable → r6-est-tokens-required → artefact green
